field_values.action_summary: Sola leaves the protagonist in his chamber, leaving him under the watchful eye of a ferocious Martian beast. The protagonist spends time studying the murals on the walls, which provide insight into Martian biology and celestial cycles.
field_values.camera_intent: Close-ups of protagonist eyes and expressions; Macro shots of mural details; Wide shots of room scale and beast positioning; Low-angle shots of the Watch Dog
field_values.end_state: scene resolves into the next narrative beat
movement_notes: Mural detail consistency across macro shots
Lighting shifts indicating passage of time
Watch Dog position relative to the door
field_values.transition_notes:
# Scene Contract: CH005_SC001

## Production Intent
Establish the protagonist's physical confinement within a decorated chamber while introducing the predatory threat of the Watch Dog. Use environmental details to transition from the tension of isolation to intellectual curiosity through the study of Martian murals.

## Required Cast
- protagonist
- sola (briefly)
- the_watch_dog

## Required Environments
- captive_chamber_murals

## Continuity Constraints
- Mural detail consistency across macro shots
- Lighting shifts indicating passage of time
- Watch Dog position relative to the door

## Beat List
- BT001: Sola departs the chamber
- BT002: The Watch Dog establishes presence
- BT003: Protagonist studies murals
field_values.dialogue_relevance: dialogue supports scene intent and continuity
